topic: The last stall in the office restroom is always occupied, the same shoes for months.
title: The Stall That Was Always Occupied | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The last stall in our office restroom has been occupied for months. Same shoes.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of restroom stalls under fluorescent light, the far stall door closed, pale shoes visible in the gap below, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is a small office. Maybe forty people, one restroom each floor.
scenes.image_prompt: Empty tiled office restroom, sinks and mirrors, harsh white light, faint reflection on wet floor, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I go in every morning at the same time.
scenes.image_prompt: Close still of a restroom door swinging shut, dim corridor light behind, polished tile floor, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That last door was shut, and two shoes faced out, unmoving.
scenes.image_prompt: Detail of a stall door gap, two still shoes pointed outward in shadow, harsh overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By lunch, the same shoes. By night, the same shoes.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed stall door with motionless shoes beneath, fluorescent flicker, empty restroom, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Weeks passed. The shoes never moved, never left, never changed.
scenes.image_prompt: Worn pale shoes in the gap beneath a stall door, dust gathering on the tile around them, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One evening, alone, I knocked. No answer came.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand raised to knock on a stall door, harsh shadow on metal partition, restroom light buzzing, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I knelt and looked under. The shoes were empty. Just standing there.
scenes.image_prompt: Low angle under a stall partition showing empty shoes standing alone on tile, no legs, cold light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Maintenance unlocked it for me. The stall inside was spotless and empty.
scenes.image_prompt: An open stall door revealing a clean empty stall, harsh light, the floor bare, deep shadow at the edges, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the shoes were back the moment the door swung closed.
scenes.image_prompt: A stall door drifting shut, the same pale shoes reappearing in the gap below, fluorescent glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now I use the floor below. Same stall. Same shoes. Always occupied.
scenes.image_prompt: Another identical restroom one floor down, far stall closed with the same shoes beneath, cold light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week I looked down mid thought. They were my shoes.
scenes.image_prompt: Close still looking down at a person's own shoes on restroom tile, harsh overhead light casting a long shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
